verses.en: Did We not expand for you, [O Muḥammad], your breast?
And We removed from you your burden
verses.id: dan kami pun telah menurunkan beban darimu,

verses.en: Which had weighed upon your back
And raised high for you your repute.
For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease [i.e., relief].
verses.id: Maka sesungguhnya bersama kesulitan ada kemudahan,

verses.en: So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship].
verses.id: Maka apabila engkau telah selesai (dari suatu urusan), tetaplah bekerja keras (untuk urusan yang lain),

verses.en: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.
verses.id: dan hanya kepada Tuhanmulah engkau berharap.
